message:
fix(twilio,youtube): wire with_retry_config to actual retry policy instead of dead field

Both Twilio and YouTube clients had a bug where with_retry_config(n) set
a dead self.max_retries field instead of self.retry_config.max_retries.
The actual retry loop used self.retry_config.to_retry_policy() which
always returned the default (3 retries), making with_retry_config(0)
ineffective. This caused test timeouts when mocking 429 responses.

- twilio/client.rs: fix with_retry_config to set retry_config.max_retries,
  make retry_config pub(crate) for test assertions, update 2 unit tests
- youtube/client.rs: same fix for with_retry_config

Follows the existing correct pattern in stripe/client.rs.
Verified: twilio 302/302, youtube 245/245 pass on vmi1227854.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
